case_title: MATHIS, REABLE vs. K.J. PRODUCE MARKET

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MATHIS, REABLE AS TO DEFENDANT K.J. PRODUCE MARKET SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-30-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-01-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-12-1994
